name: e2e-cucumber-playwright
tagline: Guides writing/reviewing Dify's Cucumber+Playwright E2E tests under e2e/, with local style rules for steps, locators, and tags.
verdict: Tightly scoped with clear in/out-of-scope boundaries, deterministic tool-preference defaults, and on-demand reference splitting. Gaps: no guidance for lint/type-check/test failures, invokes the niche vpr CLI without declaring it, and lacks a worked example of a step definition.

highlights.summary: Step 5 runs `vpr lint --fix --quiet` and `pnpm -C e2e type-check` (line 69) with no instruction for what to do if either fails.
Cucumber Expression syntax shown but no worked example of a full scenario/step-definition pair (lines 56-58).
`vpr lint` (line 69) is a niche/repo-specific tool invoked with no requirements section or availability check.
